chapter_title: Civil Liability of Persons Signing License Applications of Minors
text: The person signing a minor’s application for a license is not liable under this chapter for a negligent or wrongful act or omission of the minor committed when the minor is acting as the agent or servant of any person.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 9. CIVIL LIABILITY [17000 - 17714]
### Chapter 2. Civil Liability of Persons Signing License Applications of Minors [17700 - 17714]
##### § 17710

The person signing a minor’s application for a license is not liable under this chapter for a negligent or wrongful act or omission of the minor committed when the minor is acting as the agent or servant of any person.

*(Amended by Stats. 1967, Ch. 702.)*

subsections.text: The person signing a minor’s application for a license is not liable under this chapter for a negligent or wrongful act or omission of the minor committed when the minor is acting as the agent or servant of any person.
